ead.archdesc:
======= RMA04369Susan Ashdown papers23-19-4369Keating, EileenDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections
20202B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:26:00 UTC.Describing Archives: A Content Standard >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Susan Ashdown papers
Ashdown, S. P. (Susan P.)
Ashdown, S. P. (Susan P.)
23-19-4369
4.2 cubic feet.
1953-2018 Collection includes course material, student projects, proposals and subject files concerning Ashdown's career and early 3-D body scanning work. 10851188
Content Description
Collection includes course material, student projects, proposals and subject files concerning Ashdown's career and early 3-D body scanning work.
Biographical / Historical
Emeritus professor in the Department of Fiber Science and Apparel Design, formerly the Department of Textiles and Apparel, in the New York State College of Human Ecology.
Preferred Citation
Susan Ashdown papers, #23-19-4369. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Related Materials
See also collections #23-2-2817, #47-10-3394 and #23-19-2807 for additional biographical information.
Clothing industry -- Study and teaching. Textile schools -- New York (State) -- Ithaca. Clothing and dress--Study and teaching. Clothing trade -- Technological innovations Protective clothing. Clothing and dress measurements Ashdown, S. P. (Susan P.) New York State College of Human Ecology. Department of Textiles and Apparel
